items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.summary_cn: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT提示。分享、发现和收集社区提示。免费开源--为您的组织提供完全隐私的自助出租服务。
items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，prompts.chat这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: Autoregressive Boltzmann Generators
items.title_cn: 自回归玻尔兹曼发生器
items.summary: Efficient sampling of molecular systems at thermodynamic equilibrium is a hallmark challenge in statistical physics. This challenge has driven the development of Boltzmann Generators (BGs), which allow rapid generation of uncorrelated equilibrium samples by combining a generative model with exact li...
items.summary_cn: 在热力学平衡下对分子系统进行高效采样是统计物理学中的一个标志性挑战。这一挑战推动了玻尔兹曼发电机（ BG ）的发展，该发电机通过将生成模型与精确平衡相结合，可以快速生成不相关的平衡样本。...
items.comment: 商业模型再升级，功能看着牛，钱包要捂紧，按量付费伤不起。

items.title: Error-Conditioned Neural Solvers
items.summary: Neural surrogate models offer fast approximate mappings from PDE parameters to solutions, but they typically treat solving as a purely statistical task: once trained, they struggle to correct their own constraint violations and extrapolate beyond the training distribution. Recent hybrid methods prom...
items.summary_cn: 神经代理模型提供了从PDE参数到解决方案的快速近似映射，但它们通常将求解视为纯粹的统计任务：一旦经过训练，它们就很难纠正自己的约束违规行为，并超出训练分布。最近的混合方法PROM...
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: Understanding Domain-Aware Distribution Alignment in Budgeted Entity Matching
items.title_cn: 了解预算实体匹配中的域感知分布对齐
items.summary: Entity Matching (EM) is a core operation in the data integration pipeline, where records from different sources are compared to determine whether they refer to the same real-world entity. Recent work has incorporated domain information and low-resource learning techniques to better adapt EM systems ...
items.summary_cn: 实体匹配（ EM ）是数据集成管道中的核心操作，其中比较来自不同来源的记录，以确定它们是否引用相同的现实世界实体。最近的工作结合了领域信息和低资源学习技术，以更好地适应EM系统...
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation
items.title_cn: 人工智能法规更新-欧盟人工智能法案实施
items.summary: European Union implements AI Act, setting global standard for AI regulation.
items.summary_cn: 欧盟实施《人工智能法案》，为人工智能监管设定全球标准。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，但别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: AI Chip Market Competition Intensifies
